source: Election Commission of India — Approved Photo Identity Documents

documents.name: Voter ID Card (EPIC)
documents.tip: This is the primary document. If you have it, you're fully set.
documents.how_to_get: Apply via Form 6 on voters.eci.gov.in or at your nearest ERO office.

documents.name: Aadhaar Card
documents.conditions: Must have a photograph. e-Aadhaar (downloaded PDF) is also accepted.
documents.tip: Aadhaar is accepted both for voting and as address proof for registration.
documents.how_to_get: Apply at any Aadhaar Seva Kendra or online at uidai.gov.in.

documents.name: Passport
documents.conditions: Must be valid (not expired). Expired passports are NOT accepted for voting.
documents.tip: Works for both identity and address proof during registration.
documents.how_to_get: Apply at Passport Seva Kendra or online at passportindia.gov.in.

documents.name: Driving License
documents.conditions: Must have a photograph. Learner's license is NOT accepted.
documents.tip: Both physical and DigiLocker versions are valid.
documents.how_to_get: Apply at your nearest RTO or via parivahan.gov.in.

documents.name: PAN Card
documents.conditions: Accepted ONLY as photo identity at the polling booth. Cannot be used as address proof for voter registration.
documents.tip: Carry a backup document if your name on PAN doesn't match the voter list.
documents.how_to_get: Apply via NSDL or UTIITSL portals.

documents.name: Govt. Service Identity Card
documents.conditions: Must be issued by Central/State Government, PSU, or Public Limited Company. Must have a photo.
documents.tip: If you're a government employee, this is sufficient on its own.

documents.name: Bank/Post Office Passbook
documents.conditions: Must have a photograph of the account holder on the passbook.
documents.tip: Many older passbooks don't have photos — check yours before election day.
documents.how_to_get: Request a photo-updated passbook from your bank branch.

documents.name: MNREGA Job Card
documents.conditions: Must have a photograph. Valid only if issued by the State Government.
documents.tip: Common in rural areas — fully accepted at polling booths.
documents.how_to_get: Apply at your Gram Panchayat office.

documents.name: Health Insurance Smart Card (RSBY)
documents.conditions: Only the smart card with photo is accepted, not paper receipts.
documents.tip: The Ayushman Bharat card (PMJAY) with photo is also accepted.
documents.how_to_get: Issued by your State Health Department or at empanelled hospitals.

documents.name: Pension Document with Photo
documents.conditions: Must have a photograph of the pensioner. Ex-servicemen pension docs are also valid.
documents.tip: If you're a senior citizen with a pension, carry this along with your voter slip.
documents.how_to_get: Issued by your pension disbursing authority.

documents.name: NPR Smart Card (issued by RGI)
documents.conditions: Must be the smart card issued by the Registrar General of India under NPR.
documents.tip: This is different from the Aadhaar card — both are separately accepted.
documents.how_to_get: Issued during NPR enumeration by the RGI.

documents.name: MP/MLA/MLC Identity Card
documents.conditions: Only for current or former Members of Parliament or State Legislature.
documents.tip: Must be the official card issued by Parliament/Legislature Secretariat.
documents.how_to_get: Issued by the Parliament or State Legislature.

documents.name: Ration Card
documents.conditions: Ration cards are NOT in the list of 12 approved photo identity documents for voting.
documents.tip: However, ration cards CAN be used as address proof when applying for voter registration (Form 6).

documents.name: School/College ID Card
documents.conditions: Student ID cards are NOT accepted at the polling booth for identity verification.
documents.tip: Use your Aadhaar or passport instead. If you're 18+, register for a Voter ID.

documents.name: Birth Certificate
documents.conditions: NOT accepted at polling booths. But accepted as age proof when applying for voter registration (Form 6).
documents.tip: Useful during registration if you don't have other age proof documents.

documents.name: Electricity/Water/Gas Bill
documents.conditions: NOT accepted at polling booths. But accepted as address proof for voter registration (Form 6).
documents.tip: The bill must be recent (within 3 months) and in your name or family member's name.
